_doc: SDD_Pro validated combos + per-component validation levels — SSoT v7.0.1 (audit CRIT-5 closure, 2026-06-07). Consumed by: validate_stack_combo.py (combo signature match), match_stack_catalog.py (brownfield level derivation), preflight_stack_combo.py hook. v7.0.1 update (C5 fix audit CTO 2026-06-07) : reconciles CLAUDE.md §6 claim '13 combos SLA' with this catalog. Was C1-C5 only (5 combos vs 13 claimed). Now C1-C13 = 2 full-pipeline validated (C1, C2) + 11 bench-validated runtime (C3-C13, bench 2026-06-05). Distinction tier: 'validated' = /sdd-full bout-en-bout 100% automatisé sans intervention humaine ; 'bench-validated' = code généré compile + démarre + sert les ACs runtime (curl, build vert, page rendue), mais scaffolding /sdd-full partiellement manuel (cf. workspace/output/qa/bench/BENCH-GLOBAL-REPORT.md). Update workflow: edit this file + docs/validated-combos.md + CLAUDE.md §6 if count changes, then run framework_smoke.py.

slaScope._doc: Counts that MUST stay aligned with CLAUDE.md §6 'engagement commercial v7.0.0'. Drift triggers framework_smoke WARN.

combos.label: stack-microsoft + react
combos.notes: Full /sdd-full pipeline end-to-end validated. SqlServer also documented but formal PoC on postgres.

combos.label: stack-kotlin + react (workspace CMSPrint)
combos.notes: Full /sdd-full pipeline end-to-end validated on real workspace. ddd archi pattern itself remains experimental but exercised in this combo.

combos.label: node-express + react + auth-local (OSS-friendly C3-prod)
combos.notes: Bench runtime PASS (cross-origin REST :44329 substitution). Full /sdd-full pipeline still PENDING (priority #1 v7.1.0).

combos.label: python-fastapi + react + auth-local
combos.notes: Bench runtime PASS. POST 5+5 = 33ms (best of bench). Full /sdd-full pipeline still PENDING (priority #2).

combos.label: vue + dotnet-minimalapi + azure-ad (Vue differentiation)
combos.notes: Bench runtime PASS (substitution :44329). Full /sdd-full pipeline still PENDING (priority #3).

combos.label: kotlin-spring-boot + blazor-webassembly
combos.notes: Bench runtime PASS (cross-origin REST kotlin :44329 → blazor-wasm :5004).

combos.label: dotnet-minimalapi + blazor-webassembly
combos.notes: Bench runtime PASS (cold JIT 237ms). Microsoft-aligned stack.

combos.label: python-fastapi + vue
combos.notes: Bench runtime PASS. Python/AI market + Vue differentiation.

combos.label: python-fastapi + angular
combos.notes: Bench runtime PASS (fastapi :44329 → angular :4200). Python/Angular enterprise.

componentLevels._doc: Per-component validation level — `validated` (🟢) | `experimental` (🟡) | `untested` (🔴). MUST stay in sync with the `Validation:` header of each .claude/stacks/{cat}/{stack-id}.md file. Asserted by tests/test_combos_cross_check.py at CI time.

fullstack._doc: Fullstack monolithe stacks. poc-only = utilise interne SDD console uniquement, non destine prod externe (cf. audit P3 2026-06-05). bench-validated = runtime OK lors du bench 2026-06-05 (scaffolding semi-manuel mainteneur, cf. BENCH-GLOBAL-REPORT.md). experimental = stack OK mais combo jamais teste runtime.

mobiles._doc: Mobile native stacks. scaffold-validated = scaffolding runtime OK mais build/runtime APK/IPA pas teste cette session. bench-validated = runtime OK lors du bench 2026-06-05 (MAUI Windows desktop, RN Expo Web).

levelPriority._doc: Severity ordering used by validate_stack_combo.py to compute the overall verdict from individual component levels (max-severity wins). Audit consolide 2026-06-07 Sprint 2 (CRIT-11 closure) — added bench-validated = 0 (treated as validated for max-severity purposes : a combo entirely composed of validated + bench-validated components computes worst = bench-validated, exit 0, status reflects the lowest tier rank). Audit 2026-06-06 — added scaffold-validated (mobile scaffold-only) = experimental tier, poc-only (node-react console) = untested tier. All declared levels in componentLevels MUST appear here.
